incorrects.description: Student set Runner C bar to wrong height on first attempt

steps.text: Not quite. Runner C completed 35 laps. Find where 35 is on the axis.

incorrects.description: Student set Runner C bar to wrong height on second attempt

params.description: Axis values 30, 35, 40 highlight. Ghost gridline at 35 pulses.

steps.text: 35 is halfway between 30 and 40. Half of 10 is 5, so 30 plus 5 is 35. Set the bar to end at that line.

incorrects.description: Student set Runner C bar to wrong height three or more times. System models the answer.

params.description: System sets Runner C bar to 35, halfway between 30 and 40 lines.

steps.text: Here's how this works. I look at the data table: Runner C completed 35 laps. I find 35 on the axis. It's between the 30 line and the 40 line, exactly halfway. Half of 10 is 5, so 30 plus 5 is 35. The bar ends at 35. That's how you match the bar height to the data when the value is between the lines.
